analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE — TCGA external cohort not in local data.
discrepancy_analysis: The reported result (1 of 2 MPNST-G1 [50%] harboring PRC2 component mutations) comes from the TCGA external validation cohort described in the paper (Supplementary Fig. 3c). On page 5 the paper states: 'We confirmed this finding in the validation cohort, with 50% of MPNST-G1 tumors (1 of 2) and none of the MPNST-G2 (0 of 3) samples harboring PRC2 component gene mutations.' The local data for this reproduction task does not contain the TCGA MPNST validation cohort WES/mutation data — only the primary discovery cohort is available. Therefore the model cannot independently reproduce this statistic. This is a data availability issue (the external cohort was used only for validation in the paper and is not included in the local dataset), not a discrepancy between reported and computed values. Concordance cannot be assessed.
proposed_fix: To evaluate this statistic, the TCGA MPNST cohort WES mutation data would need to be downloaded (e.g., from cBioPortal or GDC), MPNST-G1/G2 subgroup assignments obtained (from the paper's Supplementary Fig. 3c or methylation-based classification applied to TCGA methylation data), and the proportion of MPNST-G1 tumors harboring SUZ12 or EED mutations computed.
